SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.messages.filters

Class ComparableValueFilter

java.lang.Object
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.messages.filters.ComparableValueFilter
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageFilterI.ValueFilterI, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
BetweenInclusiveValueFilter, GreaterOrEqualValueFilter, LowerOrEqualValueFilter, StrictlyGreaterValueFilter, StrictlyLowerValueFilter
public abstract class ComparableValueFilter extends Object implements MessageFilterI.ValueFilterI
Abstract base class for value filters comparing the value against bounds.

Per the soutenance review (1.6 + 1.7) we replaced the Operator enum + switch construction with a class hierarchy: each comparison kind is its own concrete subclass. Adding a new comparison only requires adding a new subclass; no existing code (in particular, no switch clause) needs to be updated. This is the Strategy pattern applied to comparable value matching.

The static factory methods on this class produce instances of the appropriate concrete subclass and are kept for backward source compatibility with all existing callers (demos, tests, application code).

Author:
Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa

  • Method Details

    • match

      public final boolean match(Serializable value)
      Description copied from interface: MessageFilterI.ValueFilterI
      return true if value matches the filter, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      match in interface MessageFilterI.ValueFilterI
      Parameters:
      value - value to be tested to match against this value filter.
      Returns:
      true if value matches the filter, otherwise false.

    • matches

      protected abstract boolean matches(Comparable<?> value)
      Subclass-defined comparison.
      Parameters:
      value - the value to test (already known to be Comparable).
      Returns:
      true if value satisfies this filter's relation.

    • greaterOrEqual

      public static ComparableValueFilter greaterOrEqual(Comparable<?> lowerBoundInclusive)
      Parameters:
      lowerBoundInclusive - borne inférieure inclusive (non null).
      Returns:
      un filtre acceptant value >= lowerBoundInclusive.

    • lowerOrEqual

      public static ComparableValueFilter lowerOrEqual(Comparable<?> upperBoundInclusive)
      Parameters:
      upperBoundInclusive - borne supérieure inclusive (non null).
      Returns:
      un filtre acceptant value <= upperBoundInclusive.

    • betweenInclusive

      public static ComparableValueFilter betweenInclusive(Comparable<?> lowerBoundInclusive, Comparable<?> upperBoundInclusive)
      Parameters:
      lowerBoundInclusive - borne inférieure inclusive (non null).
      upperBoundInclusive - borne supérieure inclusive (non null).
      Returns:
      un filtre acceptant lowerBoundInclusive <= value <= upperBoundInclusive.

    • strictlyGreater

      public static ComparableValueFilter strictlyGreater(Comparable<?> lowerBoundExclusive)
      Parameters:
      lowerBoundExclusive - borne inférieure exclusive (non null).
      Returns:
      un filtre acceptant value > lowerBoundExclusive.

    • strictlyLower

      public static ComparableValueFilter strictlyLower(Comparable<?> upperBoundExclusive)
      Parameters:
      upperBoundExclusive - borne supérieure exclusive (non null).
      Returns:
      un filtre acceptant value < upperBoundExclusive.

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
